title: Write Club 2026
pageTexts:
Write Club 2026

            GDC - San Francisco
         Tuesday, March 10 2026

Who We Are

The World's First Professional Organization for Game Writers

Founded in 2002, the IGDA Game Writing SIG has served as both a         Our Legacy
welcoming community for game writers and an advocacy
organization promoting the art and craft of game writing.                First white paper standardizing

We include anyone who writes, edits, facilitates, or designs narrative  game writing roles
for games, regardless of title.
                                                                         Foundational text books used
Our Mission
                                                                        worldwide
 Build a worldwide community of game writers
 Promote the art and craft of narrative in games                         Write Club now in its THIRD
 Educate the industry about narrative
 Work towards better narrative in games                                 decade

                                                                         Countless careers launched

                                                                        through our community

A SIG Revived

September 2025: The Constitutional Convention

After years of limited activity outside GDC, the SIG's founding members  2026 Committee
and legacy leadership convened to chart a new course with renewed
purpose, establishing a new committe with an updated constitution.        Justin Bortnick

Our Renewed Focus                                                        Chair, IRL Events

 Commitment to year-round presence at conferences and events              Jon Myers
 Mission-driven online presence grounded by a new website
 Expansion into large-scale online events for regular engagement         Secretary, Tech Officer
 Consolidation and focus to grow our digital communities & channels
                                                                          Chride Lassheikki
    Our New Site: https://www.game-writing.com
                                                                         Online Events

                                                                          Andrea Saravia-Perez

                                                                         Resources

                                                                          Sam Webb

                                                                         Moderation

                                                                          Tobias Heussner

                                                                         Mentorship

2025 Momentum: Arcjam

A 72-Hour Narrative Game Jam in Partnership With Arcweave

By the Numbers

350+ professional game writers registered

123  games submitted in 72 hours

8    industry judges

200+ pieces of personalized feedback       READ ALL ABOUT IT ON
                                             OUR UPDATED SITE
1,383 community ratings on itch.io                (click here)

The jam proved our community is hungry for opportunities ­ and that we can deliver

Our Community

A Global Network of Game Writing Professionals

2,100+          4,000+          3,500+          1,100+

Discord Server  Facebook Group  LinkedIn Group      Email List

Plus a rapidly growing presence on LinkedIn, Bluesky, and Twitter/X for direct engagement.

  Who We Reach

    Narrative designers and game writers at all career levels AAA, indie, mobile, and emerging platform creators
    Industry professionals seeking community and resources Students and educators in game narrative

Write Club @ GDC

The Signature Event for Game Writers

The Format                                                      2026 Emcee

 Game writers compete with on-the-spot written responses to           C.J. Kershner

prompts delivered by an emcee. It's chaotic, hilarious, and    WGA/BAFTA-nominated writer
                                                              Head of Polyhedron Productions
uniquely us.
   For over two decades, Write Club has been the must-attend       Longtime Write Club host
gathering for game writers at GDC and other conferences.

What to Expect

 Write Club competition (~1 hour)
 Award announcements and sponsor recognition
 Networking with 120 top game writing professionals
 An unforgettable evening in the heart of GDC week

Write Club isn't just an event. It's where collaborations begin and the community comes together

The Venue

Johnny Foley's Irish House ­ The Cellar

                                                   Where?                 When?

                                                   243 O'Farrel Street    Tuesday, March 10
                                                   3 blocks from Moscone  7:30 pm - 11:00 pm
                                                   Prime GDC real estate

"The Most Authentic Irish Pub on the West Coast"   The space

                    James Joyce Society of Dublin   Private cellar venue (the entire floor)
                                                    Capacity: ~120 guests
                                                    Separate street entrance
                                                    Private bar, stage with microphone
                                                    Intimate atmosphere, classic pub character
                                                    Perfect for Write Club

This is our most prestigious venue yet ­ an upgrade from years past, exclusively ours.

Why Sponsor?

Reach the Writers Who Shape Game Stories

Audience Value                                        Brand Alignment

 Decision-makers on tools, middleware, and resources   Associate with the craft of storytelling
 Influencers within their studios and teams            Support a dynamic sector of game development
 Active community members who share and amplify        Show commitment to professional development
 Career-focused professionals who remember support     Connect with a tight-knit appreciative community

Amplification

The members we reach actively boost each other and sponsors across their networks. Your support is
celebrated, not just listed.

              "I was blown away by the Game Writing SIG community engagement during the Arcjam.
            The way they supported each other and our team was a unique and uplifiting experience."

                                                                Manos Kalaitzoglou, CEO, Arcweave

Sponsorship Tiers

     Platinum ­ $2,500 (Exclusive)

                         "Presenting Sponsor"
 Billing: "IGDA Game Writing SIG Write Club 2026 ­ Presented by [Company]" on all materials
 Speaking: Opening or closing remarks (2-3 minutes)
 Visibility: Logo on stage banner, entrance banner, event page, ticketing page, business cards
 VIP Access: 4 Tickets + 8 Drink Tickets
 Email: Featured in all event marketing communications to membership, both ticketed and general members
 Social Media: 3 dedicated posts (LinkedIn, Bluesky, Discord) + featured mention in Facebook + LinkedIn

Group announcements

 Blog Post Spotlight: Dedicated blog post on game-writing.com, feature in event and sponsorship blog posts
 Promotional Opportunity: Featured job listing or promotional offer to membership (if applicable)
 IGDA Membership: 2 memberships (pending HQ confirmation)
 Swag: Opportunity to distribute branded materials at the event (at sponsor's cost)

Sponsorship Tiers

           Gold ­ $1,000

                  Three Committed, Two Available
 Visibility: Logo on stage banner, entrance banner, event page, ticketing page, business cards
 VIP Access: 2 Tickets + 4 Drink Tickets
 Recognition: Mentioned during sponsor remarks at event
 Email: Prominent placement in event marketing communications to membership
 Social Media: 1 dedicated post (LinkedIn or Discord) + named mention in LinkedIn Group announcement
 Blog Post: Prominent placement in event marketing and sponsorship recognition blog posts
 Promotional Opportunity: Job listing or promotional offer shared to membership (if applicable)

Sponsorship Tiers

           Silver ­ $500

               Four Committed, Multiple Available
 Visibility: Logo on stage banner, entrance banner, event page, ticketing page
 VIP Access: 1 Ticket + 2 Drink Tickets
 Recognition: Mentioned during sponsor remarks at event
 Email: Included in event marketing communications to membership
 Social Media: Named in combined sponsor spotlight post + included in Group announcements
 Blog Post: Named in event marketing and sponsorship recognition blog posts

Sponsorship Tiers

           Bronze ­ Flexible

                              "Friend of the SIG"

  For any group (studios, organizations, and communities)

   who wishes to contribute

  No fixed amount, flexible benefits ­ we'll work with you to

   find the right fit and recognize your contribution appropriately

  Every bit helps us build a stronger community

            Game Writers talk. They remember who showed up for them.
Every sponsor, at every level, becomes part of the story we're writing together.

Let's Make Write Club 2026 Unforgettable

To Sponsor

 Contact us directly or visit our sponsorship page.

Questions?

 info@game-writing.com
 (857) 363-0727 (Jon)

Learn More

 https://www.game-writing.com

 The IGDA Game Writing SIG is partnered with the International Game Developers Association,
 a 501(c)(6) professional organization
